$schema: Evaluation report from QA evaluator agent

done_conditions_results.notes: Signup works correctly, validates email format and password length
Username shows as 'undefined' after login — session data not parsed correctly

issues.description: Username displays as 'undefined' in navigation bar after login
issues.fix_suggestion: The session endpoint returns user data nested under .user.name but the NavBar component reads .name directly. Fix the destructuring in NavBar.tsx.

issues.description: Login form has no loading state during submission
issues.fix_suggestion: Add a loading spinner or disable the submit button while the login request is in flight.
